# zohomail_mailbox (Resource)

Manage a Zoho Mail mailbox backed by a real Zoho Mail user account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zohomail_mailbox" "support" {
  primary_email_address = "support@example.com"
  initial_password      = var.mailbox_initial_password
  first_name            = "Support"
  last_name             = "Team"
  display_name          = "Support"
  role                  = "member"
  country               = "FR"
  language              = "fr"
  time_zone             = "Europe/Paris"
  one_time_password     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `country` (String) Zoho Mail country code for the mailbox user.
- `display_name` (String) Mailbox display name shown in Zoho Mail.
- `first_name` (String) Mailbox user first name.
- `initial_password` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Initial password used only at mailbox creation time.
- `language` (String) Zoho Mail language code for the mailbox user.
- `last_name` (String) Mailbox user last name.
- `primary_email_address` (String) Primary mailbox email address.
- `role` (String) Zoho Mail role name applied to the mailbox user.
- `time_zone` (String) Zoho Mail time zone for the mailbox user.

### Optional

- `one_time_password` (Boolean) Whether the initial password must be changed on first login. Evaluated only when the mailbox is created.

### Read-Only

- `account_id` (String) Zoho Mail account identifier for the mailbox.
- `email_addresses` (Set of String) All email addresses currently attached to the mailbox, including aliases.
- `id` (String) Zoho Mail user identifier (`zuid`).
- `mailbox_address` (String) Mailbox address returned by Zoho Mail.
- `mailbox_status` (String) Mailbox status returned by Zoho Mail.
